dungeons.name: Mournfield
dungeons.description: What walks here is living and dead and will rob you.

dungeons.name: Onyx Hold
dungeons.description: Undead wardens still patrol the halls of this prison.

dungeons.name: Crumbling Hekma
dungeons.description: A hate-infested catacomb of the Zakarum faith.

dungeons.name: Seaside Descent
dungeons.description: A cove nestled among a graveyard of shipwrecks.

dungeons.name: Sepulcher of The Forsworn
dungeons.description: Evil stirs below the altar of Baal.

dungeons.name: Dark Ravine
dungeons.description: A Triune ritual site. The screams echo far and wide.

dungeons.name: Light's Watch
dungeons.description: A Knights' keep, repurposed for bandits and other parasites.

dungeons.name: Maulwood
dungeons.description: Bandits have claimed these woods and its monsters.

dungeons.name: Caldera Gate
dungeons.description: The demons in this icy cave are growing stronger.

dungeons.name: Derelict Lodge
dungeons.description: Once a hunting lodge, now ruled by demons.

dungeons.name: Nostrava Deepwood
dungeons.description: The undead roam among the trees.

dungeons.name: Mercy's Reach
dungeons.description: This crumbling keep was once a way through the mountains.

dungeons.name: Kor Dragan Barracks
dungeons.description: The honored halls have been left for the dead to wander.

dungeons.name: Forbidden City
dungeons.description: An ancient tomb lies open, its corruption spilling forth.

dungeons.name: Hallowed Ossuary
dungeons.description: A tomb of martyrs, desecrated and made powerful again.

dungeons.name: Black Asylum
dungeons.description: An abandoned prison teeming with the wails of its inmates.

dungeons.name: Forsaken Quarry
dungeons.description: These once-barren mineshafts now harbor ghastly rituals.

dungeons.name: Hoarfrost Demise
dungeons.description: An icy Goatman cave, littered with corpses and bones.

dungeons.name: Zenith
dungeons.description: Unmapped tunnels sprawl beneath the peaks.

dungeons.name: Dead Man's Dredge
dungeons.description: The predators that dwell in this cave hunt human game.

dungeons.name: Guulrahn Canals
dungeons.description: A rot that even the cannibal tyrant will not touch is below.

dungeons.name: Guulrahn Slums
dungeons.description: Cannibals still hold the streets of the city Guulrahn.

dungeons.name: Whispering Vault
dungeons.description: Scholarly halls haunted by whispering spirits of the insane.

dungeons.name: Shifting City
dungeons.description: These ruins were once a refuge for the people of Qara-Yisu.

dungeons.name: Pallid Delve
dungeons.description: Cannibals guard a dark power in the crumbling mines.

dungeons.name: Tormented Ruins
dungeons.description: It's been centuries since this watchtower saw mortal use.

dungeons.name: Lost Archives
dungeons.description: Many speculate what lies within, but few dare to venture on.

dungeons.name: Defiled Catacomb
dungeons.description: Graverobbers warn against the temptations of this crypt.

dungeons.name: Calibel's Mine
dungeons.description: The bandits that took this mine are ignorant of its secrets.

dungeons.name: Howling Warren
dungeons.description: A corrupted den of wolves and wargs, hungry for human flesh.

dungeons.name: Sunken Ruins
dungeons.description: Rumors stir of a healer turned renegade necromancer.

dungeons.name: Oldstones
dungeons.description: Khazra infest the ruined holdfast, ignorant of its curse.

dungeons.name: Sarat's Lair
dungeons.description: What once was a wildlife den has become a nest.

dungeons.name: Hive
dungeons.description: An insatiable will drives these creatures to feed.

dungeons.name: Whispering Pines
dungeons.description: Astaroth is gone now, but his grip on this keep holds fast.

dungeons.name: Maddux Watch
dungeons.description: This abandoned outpost treads atop the dead.

dungeons.name: Ferals' Den
dungeons.description: A lodge corrupted by the druids' hate.

dungeons.name: Twisted Hollow
dungeons.description: A veritable reservoir of wildlife where answers may lurk.

dungeons.name: Ancient Reservoir
dungeons.description: A tainted wellspring runs under these ruins.

dungeons.name: Haunted Refuge
dungeons.description: The old church sinks into the delta, drowning slowly.

dungeons.name: Belfry Zakara
dungeons.description: The Zakarum built this Cathedral. It honors the sea, now.

dungeons.name: Witchwater
dungeons.description: Nangari cultists lure prey here with songs sung in dreams.

dungeons.name: Faceless Shrine
dungeons.description: One of Hawezar’s less secretive cults. Sinners welcome.

dungeons.name: Ruins of Eridu
dungeons.description: A once-mighty fortress consumed by the swamp.

dungeons.name: Ghoa Ruins
dungeons.description: Once a keep. The swamp reclaims all that mortal hands build.

dungeons.name: Leviathan's Maw
dungeons.description: Cultists lurk in these flooded ruins.

dungeons.name: Maugan's Works
dungeons.description: A rotting hall for criminals and deserters.

dungeons.name: Blind Burrows
dungeons.description: The spiders here have acquired a taste for flesh.

dungeons.name: Abandoned Mineworks
dungeons.description: A maze of tunnels, still walked by those who died here.

dungeons.name: Sirocco Caverns
dungeons.description: A foul infestation has claimed these caverns.

dungeons.name: Halls of the Damned
dungeons.description: Triune mages once pioneered strange magics here...

dungeons.name: Conclave
dungeons.description: Tales of profane rituals grip the people with fear.

dungeons.name: Hakan's Refuge
dungeons.description: This one grand manor lies in ruins, festering with memories.

dungeons.name: Forgotten Ruins
dungeons.description: Serpents infest the bones of these forbidden mage halls.

dungeons.name: Corrupted Grotto
dungeons.description: The forgotten dead languish under barren rock.

dungeons.name: Putrid Aquifer
dungeons.description: Death taints the water.

dungeons.name: Uldur's Cave
dungeons.description: A den of murderers and carrion feeders.

dungeons.name: Heretics Asylum
dungeons.description: A jail home to the corrupt and cruel.

dungeons.name: Shivta Ruins
dungeons.description: The corruption in Alcarnus has bled into these ruins.

dungeons.name: Inferno
dungeons.description: We have carved into the rock to seek Hell.

dungeons.name: Tomb of the Saints
dungeons.description: This barren tomb was once fat with gold.

dungeons.name: Sunken Library
dungeons.description: The dead guard secrets confined in the ancient vault.

dungeons.name: Collapsed Vault
dungeons.description: In dead hands do these ancient treasures lie.

dungeons.name: Deserted Underpass
dungeons.description: A threat lurks in caves under the ruined Overlook.

dungeons.name: Endless Gates
dungeons.description: Unholy creatures run amok between realms.

dungeons.name: Bastion of Faith
dungeons.description: Lost and starving, the knights became beasts.

dungeons.name: Earthen Wound
dungeons.description: The demons that dwelled here became a feast for cannibals.

dungeons.name: Lost Keep
dungeons.description: Yet another rotting keep abandoned by the Cathedral.

dungeons.name: Heathen's Keep
dungeons.description: These Knights have sworn allegiance to a new leader.

dungeons.name: Light's Refuge
dungeons.description: In a forgotten home lies a nest made of teeth and armor.

dungeons.name: Rimescar Cavern
dungeons.description: A cave reclaimed by demons and sickened with their magic.

dungeons.name: Anica's Claim
dungeons.description: Inhuman hands carved out these dark tunnels.

dungeons.name: Cultist Refuge
dungeons.description: The last bastion of Nostrava’s cultists.

dungeons.name: Flooded Depths
dungeons.description: More than the waters have made claim to these shipwrecks.

dungeons.name: Underroot
dungeons.description: Ruins deep under T\xfar D\xfalra, its roots thick with rot.

dungeons.name: Wretched Delve
dungeons.description: Demonic plague festers now in the old tombs of T\xfar D\xfalra.

dungeons.name: Yshari Sanctum
dungeons.description: Cultists corrupt the ancient Sanctum.

dungeons.name: Renegade's Retreat
dungeons.description: Renegade knights reap the spoils of Inarius’ crusade.

dungeons.name: Crusaders' Cathedral
dungeons.description: Knights seized this temple and its undead warriors alike.

dungeons.name: Prison of Caldeum
dungeons.description: Something wicked stirs in the prison.

dungeons.name: Raethwind Wilds
dungeons.description: Too many have vanished into these woods.

dungeons.name: Penitent Cairns
dungeons.description: Glenfolk know to avoid grottoes the spirits hold sacred.

dungeons.name: Vault of The Forsaken
dungeons.description: The voices in these flooded caves lure many to their demise.

dungeons.name: Steadfast Barracks
dungeons.description: A nest of savage fanatics, drawn to evil long-buried.

dungeons.name: Akkhan's Grasp
dungeons.description: Evil and blood seep through the tomb's ruptured seals.

dungeons.name: Iron Hold
dungeons.description: A scourge stirs within the bowels of a decaying prison.

dungeons.name: Oblivion
dungeons.description: The demons of Eriman's Pyre fled to this crumbling prison.

dungeons.name: Garan Hold
dungeons.description: A once mighty stronghold, doomed to burn.

dungeons.name: Luban's Rest
dungeons.description: A warrior and her followers have risen from their tombs.

dungeons.name: Domhainne Tunnels
dungeons.description: Corbach residents hear the screams from the Khazra’s lair.

dungeons.name: Mariner's Refuge
dungeons.description: The Drowned lure shipwrecked sailors to the depths.

dungeons.name: Kor Valar Ramparts
dungeons.description: A corrupted fortress concealing the sins of the Penitents.

dungeons.name: Aldurwood
dungeons.description: In this corrupted wood, blood runs like sap from the trees.

dungeons.name: Jalal's Vigil
dungeons.description: A forest, soured by the agony of its own protector.

dungeons.name: Serpent's Lair
dungeons.description: Once the seat of Mohlon's throne. They want another queen.

dungeons.name: Shadowed Plunge
dungeons.description: Snake Cultists sacrifice the innocent.

dungeons.name: Demon's Wake
dungeons.description: The keep still burns in the wake of Lilith’s attack.

dungeons.name: Broken Bulwark
dungeons.description: Once part of Donan's estate, and razed with the rest.

dungeons.name: Fetid Mausoleum
dungeons.description: A forgotten tomb for the restless dead of Eridu.

dungeons.name: Buried Halls
dungeons.description: The Triune fight to reclaim these ancient halls.

dungeons.name: Path of the Blind
dungeons.description: The bloodstained initiation grounds for Triune aspirants.

dungeons.name: Grinning Labyrinth
dungeons.description: These labyrinthine halls have broken far greater warriors.

dungeons.name: Betrayer's Row
dungeons.description: The twisted remains of a town driven mad by envy.

dungeons.name: Stockades
dungeons.description: After a riot, this prison was walled off and made a tomb.

dungeons.name: Carrion Fields
dungeons.description: The defilers of this land were cursed to wander it forever.

dungeons.name: Komdor Temple
dungeons.description: A Triune sect cursed to forever walk Sanctuary as goatmen.

dungeons.name: Ancient's Lament
dungeons.description: A tomb and prison for the anguished souls trapped within.

dungeons.name: Champion's Demise
dungeons.description: Once beautiful homelands now overrun with demons.

dungeons.name: Sealed Archives
dungeons.description: An ancient mage hall. Once refuge, now graveyard.

dungeons.name: Bloodsoaked Crag
dungeons.description: A feasting ground for the flesh-hungry.

dungeons.name: Charnel House
dungeons.description: Bodies are stored here, some still alive. Food for demons.

dungeons.name: Fading Echo
dungeons.description: These ruins have become host to a growing army of demons.

dungeons.name: Sanguine Chapel
dungeons.description: A snowed in abandoned Zakarum church invaded by vampires.

dungeons.name: Immortal Emanation
dungeons.description: A hunting ground, when prey is foolish enough to enter.

dungeons.name: Forgotten Depths
dungeons.description: A shadow lies below these hallowed stones.

dungeons.name: Ularian Sepulcher
dungeons.description: Cursed burial ground, feared by all.

dungeons.name: Hallowed Stones
dungeons.description: Amidst a storm of evil, something hopeful flickers weakly.

dungeons.name: Vile Hive
dungeons.description: The sounds of skittering fiends echo through this foul nest.

dungeons.name: Remnants of Rage
dungeons.description: Within these confines, something restless trembles.

dungeons.name: Forge of Malice
dungeons.description: The fires of hatred continue to burn in this hidden refuge.

dungeons.name: Hierophant Pyre
dungeons.description: Once used to burn opposers of Sankekur, the pyres are relit.

dungeons.name: Murmuring Spiral
dungeons.description: Scales and spirals hypnotize, and some come too close.

dungeons.name: Iron Cenotaph
dungeons.description: The first home of the Iron Wolves before the fall of Kurast.

dungeons.name: Razak's Descent
dungeons.description: Where light is lost and intentions are twisted within roots.

dungeons.name: Feeding Grounds
dungeons.description: Fresh victims are fed to the demons in this place.

dungeons.name: Putrescent Larder
dungeons.description: The repugnant air affirms where Lacuni store their meats.

dungeons.name: Seething Underpass
dungeons.description: Submerged corruption rises from the sunken channels.

dungeons.name: Betrayed Tomb
dungeons.description: Spirits writhe as hollows screech out in monstrous agony.

dungeons.name: Caves of Kutokue
dungeons.description: Screams of desperation echo in the walls.

dungeons.name: Sleepless Hollow
dungeons.description: When the dead are forgotten, flesh and bone rise again.

dungeons.name: Farai Cliffs
dungeons.description: The blood of outsiders glistens in the moonlight.

dungeons.name: Ruined Wild
dungeons.description: A place of spirituality is now home to unwelcomed guests.

dungeons.name: Beast Graveyard
dungeons.description: Scavengers often come to profit off the holy giants.

dungeons.name: Forgotten Remains
dungeons.description: Villagers have mysteriously disappeared in this vicinity.

dungeons.name: Skatsimi Fane
dungeons.description: Long deprived of worship, who knows what remains of the old.
